title: Convert month-to-month users to long-term plans
action: Offer discounted one-year or two-year contract plans with clear savings and loyalty benefits.
why: Month-to-month customers typically have lower switching cost and higher churn risk.

title: Reduce price pressure
action: Offer loyalty discounts, plan optimization, downgrade recommendations, or value-based bundles.
why: Customers with high monthly charges may churn if they feel price exceeds perceived value.

title: Increase security feature adoption
action: Offer a free online security trial or discounted security bundle.
why: Customers without online security may perceive lower service value and be more likely to churn.

title: Improve support confidence
action: Offer premium tech support, fast-track issue resolution, or proactive service checks.
why: Lack of tech support can reduce trust when service issues happen.

title: Strengthen onboarding for new customers
action: Provide onboarding help, welcome offers, check-in calls, and early-value education.
why: Low-tenure customers are still forming habits and are more likely to leave early.

title: Re-engage inactive customers
action: Send personalized outreach, feature education, relevant recommendations, and targeted reminders.
why: Low engagement often signals weak product attachment and churn risk.

title: Increase stickiness through bundling
action: Recommend bundles that improve convenience, simplify billing, and increase perceived value.
why: Bundled services can improve retention by making the overall offering harder to replace.

title: Improve digital engagement
action: Encourage paperless billing, app usage, and digital self-service features.
why: Digital engagement can increase convenience and strengthen customer stickiness.

title: Protect high-value customers
action: Give high-value customers proactive retention offers, premium service, and personalized outreach.
why: When a high-value customer churns, revenue loss is greater, so retention action should be prioritized.

title: Escalate high-risk customers quickly
action: Use urgent retention outreach with prioritized incentives and a human follow-up if possible.
why: High-risk customers need immediate action rather than passive messaging.
